ogTitle: Wandook vs Wang Wauk: Climate Safety

heading: Wandook vs Wang Wauk — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wandook, New South Wales and Wang Wauk, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wandook has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Wang Wauk (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wandook or Wang Wauk safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wandook has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Wang Wauk scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wandook scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Wang Wauk scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wandook or Wang Wauk?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wandook has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
